onboarding.welcome_description: I'm your personal health assistant. I can help you track meals, plan workouts, and achieve your health goals using AI-powered analysis and personalized recommendations.
onboarding.step_1_description: Please enter your basic biometrics for TDEE calculation.
onboarding.step_2_description: Select your biological sex, fitness goal, and activity level.
onboarding.step_3_description: Help us understand any allergies and health conditions to keep you safe.
privacy_description: • After setup, I'll create a **private channel** just for you!
• Your daily health logs stay private.
onboarding.disclaimer_description:
Health Butler provides **general health information** only.
• Not a substitute for professional medical advice
• Always consult healthcare professionals for serious conditions
• Your data is stored securely and never shared with third parties.

workout_log.log_description: Log your workout! Supports text or images.

nutrition_log.log_description: Send a photo of your food!
examples: Sent a photo of my lunch
